MOTION TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH SUBPOENAS
Off Calendar Mar-07-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. IAN W. FORGIE, Esq. of Lawson & Lawson LLP (Tel: 415-484-4345) for plaintiff;
Atty. JOSEPH D. O'NEIL, Esq. of McNamara, Ambacher, Wheeler, Hirsig & Gray LLP (Tel: 925-939-5330) for defendant June Lee;
Non-party WILLIAM DUANE (Tel: 415-755-7902) in pro per;

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF ROBERT COPELAND'S MOTION TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH SUBPOENAS.

All parties stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge, counsel for parties, and Mr. Duane (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter argued and submitted.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling with a modification, as follows:

The Motion is granted. William Duane shall, within 10 days, comply with the deposition subpoena for records personally served on him on December 14, 2022.

No sanctions awarded.

Counsel for plaintiff to prepare and submit a proposed order to the pro tem judge at tom@thomascohen.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/JPT)
